commands: find brushes/Dieterle -iname '*.myb' ! -name 'arrow#1.myb' ! -name 'Fount-offset#1.myb' ! -name 'Pencil-_Left_Handed.myb' ! -name 'HalfToneCMY#1.myb' ! -name 'Fountain_SF#1.myb' ! -name 'HalfTone#1.myb' ! -name '8B_Pencil#1.myb' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 perl -i -pe 'BEGIN{$m=0} $m=1 if s/surfacemap_x/gridmap_x/g; $m=1 if s/surfacemap_y/gridmap_y/g; END{ if(!$m){ warn "Patch failed on $ARGV\n"; exit 1 } }'
